sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Crcy, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, Amt1, Amt2, Flex1) (select KeyID, Yr, Crcy, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, 'Reg' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Yr, Crcy, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 is NULL or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0))
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Crcy, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, Amt1, Amt2, Flex1) (select KeyID, Yr, Crcy, Co, replace(GL,'89','00') as GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, Amt1, Amt2, Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '824')
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'FX' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,6,2) in ('96','97','98') or GL like '3%' or GL like '71%' or GL in ('2421001','2421002'))
update TransX set Flex1 = 'FX' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GLdesc like '%Fx%'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Est' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,6,2) = '01' or GL = '1310002')
update TransX set Flex1 = 'OC' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(PC,1,2) = '16')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'AW' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1,'3590099' as GL,'CTA FX' as GLdesc, f2.Amt1, f2.Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '359%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname) f1 inner join (Select Crcy,PC,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF088' and GL like '359%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by Crcy,PC) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC where f2.Amt1 <> 0 or f2.Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'NoB' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1,'3590099' as GL,'CTA FX' as GLdesc, round(f1.Amt1 - coalesce(f2.Amt1,0),2) as Amt1, round(f1.Amt2 - coalesce(f2.Amt2,0),2) as Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname, sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '359%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR <> 'AW' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname) f1 left join (Select Crcy,PC,sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL = '3590099' and UWYR = 'AW' group by Crcy,PC) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC where coalesce(f2.Amt1,0) <> f1.Amt1 or coalesce(f2.Amt2,0) <> f1.Amt2)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'AW' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1,'4398099' as GL,'UGLOE FX' as GLdesc, f2.Amt1, f2.Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '4398%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname) f1 inner join (Select Crcy,PC,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF088' and GL like '4398%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by Crcy,PC) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC where f2.Amt1 <> 0 or f2.Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'NoB' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1,'4398099' as GL,'UGLOE FX' as GLdesc, round(f1.Amt1 - coalesce(f2.Amt1,0),2) as Amt1, round(f1.Amt2 - coalesce(f2.Amt2,0),2) as Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname, sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '4398%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR <> 'AW' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname) f1 left join (Select Crcy,PC,sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL = '4398099' and UWYR = 'AW' group by Crcy,PC) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC where coalesce(f2.Amt1,0) <> f1.Amt1 or coalesce(f2.Amt2,0) <> f1.Amt2)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'AW' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, f2.Amt1, f2.Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL > '4000000' and not GL like '4398%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 inner join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF088' and GL > '4000000' and not GL like '4398%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.GL = f2.GL where f2.Amt1 <> 0 or f2.Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'NoB' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, round(f1.Amt1 - coalesce(f2.Amt1,0),2) as Amt1, round(f1.Amt2 - coalesce(f2.Amt2,0),2) as Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc, sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL > '4000000' and not GL like '4398%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR <> 'AW' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 left join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL > '4000000' and not GL like '4398%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR = 'AW' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.GL = f2.GL where coalesce(f2.Amt1,0) <> f1.Amt1 or coalesce(f2.Amt2,0) <> f1.Amt2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and (GL > '4000000' or GL like '359%') and Flex1 = 'FX' and not UWYR in ('AW','NoB')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'AW' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, f2.Amt1, f2.Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '142%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 inner join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF088' and GL like '202%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and substring(f1.GL,4,4) = substring(f2.GL,4,4) where f2.Amt1 <> 0 or f2.Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'NoB' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, round(f1.Amt1 - coalesce(f2.Amt1,0),2) as Amt1, round(f1.Amt2 - coalesce(f2.Amt2,0),2) as Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc, sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '142%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR <> 'AW' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 left join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '142%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR = 'AW' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.GL = f2.GL where coalesce(f2.Amt1,0) <> f1.Amt1 or coalesce(f2.Amt2,0) <> f1.Amt2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '142%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and not UWYR in ('AW','NoB')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'AW' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, f2.Amt1, f2.Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '143%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 inner join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF088' and GL like '203%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and substring(f1.GL,4,4) = substring(f2.GL,4,4) where f2.Amt1 <> 0 or f2.Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'NoB' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, round(f1.Amt1 - coalesce(f2.Amt1,0),2) as Amt1, round(f1.Amt2 - coalesce(f2.Amt2,0),2) as Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc, sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '143%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR <> 'AW' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 left join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '143%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR = 'AW' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.GL = f2.GL where coalesce(f2.Amt1,0) <> f1.Amt1 or coalesce(f2.Amt2,0) <> f1.Amt2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '143%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and not UWYR in ('AW','NoB')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'AW' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, f2.Amt1, f2.Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '159%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 inner join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF088' and GL like '219%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and substring(f1.GL,4,4) = substring(f2.GL,4,4) where f2.Amt1 <> 0 or f2.Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'NoB' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, round(f1.Amt1 - coalesce(f2.Amt1,0),2) as Amt1, round(f1.Amt2 - coalesce(f2.Amt2,0),2) as Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc, sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '159%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR <> 'AW' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 left join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '159%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR = 'AW' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.GL = f2.GL where coalesce(f2.Amt1,0) <> f1.Amt1 or coalesce(f2.Amt2,0) <> f1.Amt2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '159%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and not UWYR in ('AW','NoB')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'AW' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, f2.Amt1, f2.Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '287%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 inner join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF088' and GL like '189%' and Flex1 = 'FX' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and substring(f1.GL,4,4) = substring(f2.GL,4,4) where f2.Amt1 <> 0 or f2.Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Flex1,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2) (Select f1.KeyID,f1.Yr,f1.Co,f1.Crcy,f1.PC,f1.TP,f1.TPname, '31' as BusCat, '' as Contract, 'NoB' as UWYR, 'FX' as Flex1, f1.GL, f1.GLdesc, round(f1.Amt1 - coalesce(f2.Amt1,0),2) as Amt1, round(f1.Amt2 - coalesce(f2.Amt2,0),2) as Amt2 from (Select KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc, sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '287%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR <> 'AW' group by KeyID,Yr,Co,Crcy,PC,TP,TPname,GL,GLdesc) f1 left join (Select Crcy,PC,GL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1, sum(Amt2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '287%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and UWYR = 'AW' group by Crcy,PC,GL,GLdesc) f2 on f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.GL = f2.GL where coalesce(f2.Amt1,0) <> f1.Amt1 or coalesce(f2.Amt2,0) <> f1.Amt2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and GL like '287%' and Flex1 = 'FX' and not UWYR in ('AW','NoB')
update TransX set UWYR = 'NoB' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'FF001' and not UWYR = 'AW' and Flex1 = 'FX'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Crcy, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],
insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Crcy, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, Amt2) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],
